name: Arabica Whole Bean Coffee
description: Selected 100% Arabica beans medium roast. Rich flavor with chocolate notes and light acidity.

name: Wheat Ramen Noodles
description: Traditional Japanese ramen noodles. Perfect for making authentic broth with egg and vegetables.

name: Matcha Green Tea
description: Japanese ceremonial grade matcha powder. Rich umami flavor and natural energy.

name: Fettuccine Pasta
description: Italian pasta from durum wheat. Perfect for creamy sauces and classic dishes.

name: Espresso Ground Coffee
description: Classic espresso blend fine grind. Strong rich flavor with thick crema.

name: Udon Noodles
description: Thick wheat noodles for Japanese soups and stir-fries. Soft texture and neutral flavor.

name: Milk Oolong Tea
description: Taiwanese oolong with delicate creamy aroma. Soft flavor with floral notes.

name: Classic Spaghetti
description: Traditional Italian spaghetti from durum wheat. Holds shape perfectly and pairs with any sauce.
